end,function(K,N)local o=r(N)local f=function(f)return h(K,{f},N,o)end return f end,{},function(K,N)local o=r(N)local f=function(f,t)return h(K,{f,t},N,o)end return f end,function(K,N)local o=r(N)local f=function(f,t,p,g,q)return h(K,{f;t,p;g,q},N,o)end return f end,function(K,N)local o=r(N)local f=function()return h(K,{},N,o)end return f end,function()I=(744374-744373)+I T[I]=-38252+38253 return I end,function(K,N)local o=r(N)local f=function(f,t,p,g,q,e)return h(K,{f;t,p;g;q,e},N,o)end return f end return(W(5574104-269135,{}))(o(q))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[N(222857+-235907)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
